name: GTreasury Treasury Management System REST API
what_it_does: GTreasury treasury management system REST API for corporate treasurers, finance teams, and CFOs to manage global cash positions, bank connections, payment workflows, FX risk, debt management, and short-term investments — enabling automated treasury operations, multi-bank cash visibility, payment processing, hedging strategy, and working capital optimization through GTreasury's cloud-native TMS connecting to 200+ banks and financial institutions. Enables AI agents to manage cash position for multi-bank balance aggregation and forecasting automation, handle payment workflow for global payment submission and approval automation, access bank statement for MT940/BAI2 bank statement processing automation, retrieve FX exposure for currency risk tracking and hedge automation, manage investment portfolio for short-term investment and money market automation, handle debt tracking for loan and credit facility covenant management automation, access cash forecast for short and medium-term liquidity projection automation, retrieve bank connectivity for SWIFT, H2H, and SFTP bank connection automation, manage netting for intercompany settlement and netting cycle automation, and integrate GTreasury with ERP (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite) and banking partners for treasury automation.
use_cases: Aggregating global cash positions across 200+ banks for corporate treasury visibility automation agents
Processing and approving global payment workflows for treasury payment operations automation agents
Managing FX exposure and hedging strategy for corporate currency risk automation agents
Generating short-term cash forecasts from bank data and ERP for liquidity planning automation agents
not_for: Small business banking (GTreasury targets mid-market and enterprise treasury, not SMB)
Consumer financial management (GTreasury is corporate treasury, not personal finance)
Investment banking trading (GTreasury is corporate cash management, not capital markets trading)
best_when: A corporate treasurer or CFO at a mid-market or enterprise company wanting AI agents to automate multi-bank cash visibility, global payment processing, FX risk management, and treasury reporting through GTreasury's cloud-native treasury management platform.
avoid_when: BANK CONNECTIVITY ONBOARDING REQUIRED: GTreasury bank connections require bank-specific onboarding; automated instant multi-bank access assumption creates bank_not_connected; automated must complete bank connectivity setup per financial institution. ERP INTEGRATION IS DATA SOURCE: GTreasury cash forecasting requires ERP AP/AR data; automated standalone treasury assumption creates incomplete_forecast without ERP connection; automated must integrate ERP for complete cash forecast. PAYMENT APPROVAL IS ROLE-BASED: GTreasury enforces payment maker-checker; automated single-user payment assumption creates approval_required for payments needing dual authorization; automated must implement role-based payment approval workflow. HEDGE ACCOUNTING REQUIRES SPECIALIST: FAS 133/IAS 39 hedge accounting in GTreasury requires accounting expertise; automated automated-hedge-accounting assumption creates accounting_error; automated must involve treasury accountants for hedge designation and effectiveness testing.

auth.notes: GTreasury uses OAuth2 for TMS REST API. REST API with JSON. Chicago, IL HQ. Founded 2000 as Treasury Intelligence Solutions (TIS). Rebranded GTreasury 2020. Products: Cash Management, Payments, FX Risk, Investments, Debt, Analytics. 200+ bank connections. SWIFT connectivity. Backed by Investcorp. Competes with Kyriba, ION Treasury, and Bottomline for mid-market TMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified prospects; production requires GTreasury contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription by module and company size; bank connectivity fees; implementation services
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. Investcorp backed. Annual subscription. Mid-market treasury. 200+ bank connections.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; payment and cash APIs throttled per tenant plan

known_agent_gotchas: BANK STATEMENT FORMATS VARY: Banks deliver statements in MT940, BAI2, CAMT.053 formats; automated uniform format assumption creates format_not_supported for non-standard bank statement formats; automated must handle multiple bank statement format mapping in GTreasury

PAYMENT STATUS IS BANK-DEPENDENT: Payment confirmation from banks varies by delivery method and bank; automated instant confirmation assumption creates payment_pending for bank processing time; automated must implement payment status polling per bank delivery SLA

MULTI-CURRENCY CASH POSITIONS NEED FX RATES: Consolidated cash positions require FX rate inputs; automated single-currency assumption creates missing_FX_conversion for multi-currency treasury positions; automated must feed FX rates for accurate consolidated reporting

FORECAST ACCURACY DEPENDS ON DATA QUALITY: GTreasury cash forecasts are only as accurate as input data; automated high-accuracy forecast assumption creates forecast_error for companies with poor ERP/AP data quality; automated must validate ERP data quality before relying on forecast outputs

NETTING REQUIRES ALL PARTICIPANTS: Intercompany netting cycles require all participating entities to submit positions; automated partial-netting assumption creates incomplete_netting_cycle; automated must coordinate all entity position submissions before netting settlement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Treasury management. SOC2, SOX, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU. Corporate cash, payment, and FX data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate treasury. SOC2, SOX. OAuth2. US/EU. Cash, payment, and treasury data.
